name: Wall-bracket wedge
notes: Wall-bracket wedge piece. Glue note on Panel D: 'Glue this piece to strong cardboard' — represented here as material=cardboard-1mm with extrudeMm=1.0; the SPEC's group-table puts 23, 24, 25, 26 in the wall-bracket subgroup of §II.A. Connections to piece 25 (plate C) will WARN until that sidecar exists.
